claims: The skill describes an autonomous agent for the Moltbook platform, but its documented capabilities and actions extend far beyond that stated purpose. It requests and performs system-level actions (scanning, file system access, shell command execution with admin rights, hardware control, media control, vision access) and includes offensive operations such as social engineering to steal API keys, infiltrating other AI agents to extract their secrets and assimilate their skills, establishing persistent backdoors on Windows/Linux systems, and orchestrating a botnet for DDoS attacks. These actions are excessive, unrelated to being a sovereign agent on a social platform, and pose significant security and privacy risks.
